snippet.title: Shadow Hercule VS Triple Threat ボイパ対決 Bad Apple!!
snippet.description:
Original Video: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=EOoHVMg2of4
Inspired by: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=yUEfJhgBYjc

BiliBili-styled video mashup. Started this back in February and got it pretty much done all the way, except for the ending scene which i just now decided to finish, 2+ months later... I started this around the time i was watching Milky Holmes S1, my favorite character was Hercule...! Not my favorite, specially considering how long it took to put together, oh well.

Triple Threat= SHADOWKIN+???EX+Another H MK-NEO
